samples.question: What is the worst-case time complexity of quicksort?
What is the worst-case time complexity of quicksort?
samples.student_answer: It's O(n squared) when the pivot is always the smallest or largest element.

samples.question: Why does a recursive function need a base case?
samples.expected_answer: Without a base case the recursion never terminates and causes a stack overflow.
samples.student_answer: So it knows when to stop.

samples.question: What is a variable?
samples.expected_answer: A named storage location that holds a value which can change.
samples.student_answer: A named container that stores a value you can read and reassign.

samples.question: What does a pointer store?
samples.expected_answer: A memory address of another value.
